title: Sinbad and the War of the Furies
original_title: Sinbad and the War of the Furies
overview: On a treasure hunt gone wrong, modern-day adventurer Sinbad accidentally releases the Furies, three beautiful but terrible ancient beings powerful enough to threaten life on Earth.
